description: Composition:Green round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking Remove promptly 5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only 7. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Comfort FitImpress your granny instead of that cute neighbour, for a change! It is hip to be spiritual and ethical to be religious. So why not wear this t-shirt from tantra with Sanskrit shlokas and don the miss-goodie-two-shoes look with a twist!Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts 2. Height-5.7", Chest-32", Waist-26"
